title: The Joint Bank Reporting Committee launches call to join the Reporting Contact Group
clean_title: The Joint Bank Reporting Committee launches call to join the Reporting Contact Group
summary: The Joint Bank Reporting Committee (JBRC), jointly set up by the European Banking Authority (EBA) and the European Central Bank (ECB), today launched a public call for expressions of interest to join its Reporting Contact Group (RCG). The RCG brings together stakeholders with expertise in banks’ regulatory reporting and serves as a regular forum for cooperation, exchange of views and sharing of best practices with authorities. The call is open to candidates representing stakeholders across the European Economic Area (EEA).
why_selected: Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; information très récente.
impacts: Impact métier modéré mais utile pour maintenir une veille sectorielle structurée.
title_signature: call committee contact group join joint launches reporting
normalized_title: the joint bank reporting committee launches call to join the reporting contact group
